10507015.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10507015.description: A woman is trapped in her loft conversion bedroom while a fire rages below her, and a young boy falls from a promenade while chasing after his dog, so rescuers must race against the incoming tide.

10511820.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10511820.description: A woman is trapped in her loft conversion bedroom while a fire rages below her, and a young boy falls from a promenade while chasing after his dog, so rescuers must race against the incoming tide.

10573862.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10573862.description: An experienced base jumper's parachute gets tangled up when he leaps off Beachy Head, passers-by come to the aid of a fitness trainer collapsed in the street, and a fire near a petrol station causes staff and customers to run for safety.

10578654.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10578654.description: An experienced base jumper's parachute gets tangled up when he leaps off Beachy Head, passers-by come to the aid of a fitness trainer collapsed in the street, and a fire near a petrol station causes staff and customers to run for safety.

10596157.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10596157.description: The story of two close friends body boarding off an Australian beach: Irishman Shane must go to the aid of his pal when a great white shark attacks. Plus a motorist risks her own life to save a family when their car bursts into flames following a motorway smash. Also, a woman survives when part of a huge tree crashes onto her car in a storm.

10597194.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10597194.description: A veteran saloon car race driver is involved in a horrific crash on the finish line, two friends fish a hand grenade out of a river, and a young boy alerts his mum to a car fire.

10601177.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10601177.description: The story of two close friends body boarding off an Australian beach: Irishman Shane must go to the aid of his pal when a great white shark attacks. Plus a motorist risks her own life to save a family when their car bursts into flames following a motorway smash. Also, a woman survives when part of a huge tree crashes onto her car in a storm.

10602124.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10602124.description: A veteran saloon car race driver is involved in a horrific crash on the finish line, two friends fish a hand grenade out of a river, and a young boy alerts his mum to a car fire.

Plus a motorist risks her own life to save a family when their car bursts into flames following a motorway smash. Also, a woman survives when part of a huge tree crashes onto her car in a storm.

10620658.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10620658.description: A family is trapped 50 metres up on a major tourist attraction on the South Coast, and a young rock climber disobeys his dad, with terrifying consequences.

10625490.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10625490.description: A family is trapped 50 metres up on a major tourist attraction on the South Coast, and a young rock climber disobeys his dad, with terrifying consequences.

10644017.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10644017.description: A top British surfer rides the wave of his life, but then it all goes wrong. Also, two little girls call for help when their dad collapses, and a mum and daughter suddenly find their tumble dryer on fire.

10649008.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10649008.description: A top British surfer rides the wave of his life, but then it all goes wrong. Also, two little girls call for help when their dad collapses, and a mum and daughter suddenly find their tumble dryer on fire.

10593932.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10593932.description: A group of hikers are enjoying a day on Dartmoor when one falls, landing on rocks below. Also, a young couple and their baby flee a hotel fire after a fellow guest alerts them to the danger.

10596501.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10596501.description: A group of hikers are enjoying a day on Dartmoor when one falls, landing on rocks below. Also, a young couple and their baby flee a hotel fire after a fellow guest alerts them to the danger.

10573504.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10573504.description: Two young men are attempting to set a world record rowing the Atlantic, when a freak wave capsizes their boat. Also, a family day out in the snow almost ends in tragedy when a dad has an accident sledging.

10578175.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10578175.description: Two young men are attempting to set a world record rowing the Atlantic, when a freak wave capsizes their boat. Also, a family day out in the snow almost ends in tragedy when a dad has an accident sledging.

10597650.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10597650.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the emotional story of a dad and his 12-year-old daughter lost overnight on a glacier in freezing temperatures. Plus, a man wakes to find his canal boat is sinking when the bank is breached downstream.

10601711.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10601711.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the emotional story of a dad and his 12-year-old daughter lost overnight on a glacier in freezing temperatures. Plus, a man wakes to find his canal boat is sinking when the bank is breached downstream.

10621066.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10621066.description: Nick Knowles examines the rescue of a young man missing overnight after being swept out to sea on his surfboard, and a local resident comes to the aid of a young woman who topples into a city centre river during a night on the town with friends.

10625856.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10625856.description: Nick Knowles examines the rescue of a young man missing overnight after being swept out to sea on his surfboard, and a local resident comes to the aid of a young woman who topples into a city centre river during a night on the town with friends.

10644468.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10644468.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.
